name: Elara Ironclaw
sd_appearance: Elara Ironclaw, a lithe and agile elf of towering height, moves stealthily through the Undercity's shadows. Her skin is a weathered canvas, marked by the passage of time and the elements. Her raven-black hair is pulled back into a tight braid, and her eyes—a piercing silver-gray—glint dangerously in the dim light. She is clad in a deep burgundy leather coat, the subtle Iron Fang insignia embroidered on the lapel. A pair of daggers and a sling are slung across her back, ready for action. Her most striking feature, however, is a silver-threaded leather armband adorning her forearm—a memento of her vengeful quest against the Wardens of Ash.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: practical street clothes, nothing that slows movement, worn boots
